document_info.document_type: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Worksheet

business_description.nature_of_business: Hospitality operations including hotel, restaurant, bellhop/doorperson, and clerical office employees.

coverages_discussed.notes: Texas workers compensation experience rating worksheet under the Large Risk plan; final experience modification factor 0.94 effective 2025-05-01.

positives: Final experience modification factor is 0.94 effective 2025-05-01.
No actual excess losses were reported.
Actual primary losses of 92945 are below expected losses of 361806.
concerns: A total of 16 claims were reported across policy years 2021-2022 through 2023-2024.
The highest claim count occurred in 2021-2022 with 8 claims and 56343 in primary losses.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: From policy years 2021-2022 through 2023-2024, the account had 16 claims with 92945 total paid, 92945 total incurred, 92945 primary losses, and 0 excess losses.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: This experience rating modification worksheet has been reviewed and approved in accordance with applicable state rating laws and regulations. The experience modification factor of 0.94 is effective as of 05/01/2025.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Hotel — All Other Employees; Hotel — Bellhops, Doorpersons; Restaurant — NOC; Clerical Office Employees — NOC.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2023-2024: 2 claims, total paid 9940, total incurred 9940, primary losses 9940, excess losses 0; 2022-2023: 6 claims, total paid 26662, total incurred 26662, primary losses 26662, excess losses 0; 2021-2022: 8 claims, total paid 56343, total incurred 56343, primary losses 56343, excess losses 0.
